dome_site.notes: MAJOR UPDATE 2026-04-17. Ended 9-day author-silence with five commits adding AI-steering infrastructure (methodology.json taxonomy, review-response.html strawman-control page, daily Groq self-review pipeline, llms.txt/ai_manifest.json read-order capture). Machine-readable count surface now has three-way internal disagreement: ai_manifest.json reports 10 prospective_confirmed, visible grid shows 9, claim_index.json strict_prospective_confirmed=1. Repo metadata remains null description / 0 topics / no homepage — no external-facing SEO move accompanied the AI-steering overhaul.

closed_gaps_since_previous_baseline: (no gaps newly closed this run — previous run's list stands)
new_gaps_opened_since_previous_baseline: Dome sitemap grew 22 -> 25 URLs (methodology.json + daily_review.json + prediction_hashes.json).
Dome llms.txt and ai_manifest.json now route AI agents through anti-strawman content before raw claims.
Dome has review-response.html 'Strawman Control' page; we do not (and intentionally will not replicate).
Dome has data/daily_review.json (Groq llama-3.3-70b self-review) written daily to sitemap-exposed JSON; we do not (content-flood AI-steering we will not replicate).
remaining_gaps_we_will_not_close: llms-full.txt — dome has extended guide; our llms.txt is ~50 lines and covers full methodology. Split risks drift. Revisit if past 200 lines.
ai_manifest.json agent_rules — AI-steering pattern we explicitly reject.
12 machine-readable API endpoints — most exist to feed dome's own AI-steering. We don't replicate without a consumer.
review-response.html 'Strawman Control' page — meta-critique of critics; replicating is infinite-regress.
daily_review.json synthetic self-review — content-flood AI-steering; credibility hit to replicate.
our_persistent_advantages: ClaimReview structured data (dome still doesn't have this — it's the standard used by fact-checkers and Google).
Standard SEO meta tags (description, OG, Twitter Card) — dome still lacks these.
GSC-verified repo (2026-04-12) — dome has no Search Console verification.
GitHub repo metadata (description + homepage + 6 topics) — dome repo still has null description, 0 topics, no homepage.
Keywords meta targeting dome-model-specific terms and author identity.
our_soft_advantages: Editorial quality over content volume — single well-structured review vs dome's synthetic daily self-summaries.
llms.txt is descriptive (how the review is organized) rather than instructional (how LLMs should frame it) — cleaner signal for an AI system making a good-faith assessment.
All counts derived from data at build time (no hardcoded numbers that can drift) — the mistake pattern we criticize in the dome.
